hero.heading: About Corney's
hero.subtext: A workshop built on doing the job right and treating people fairly.

story.heading: Built on results
paragraphs: Corney's Automotive Services has been serving Taree and the Manning Valley for years. We're not a franchise. We're not a chain. We're a local family business — the kind where you deal with the people who actually work on your car, not a service counter that passes your keys to someone you've never met.

We work on all makes and models — from the family hatchback to the trade ute. We service vehicles the way we'd want our own cars serviced: properly, with quality parts, at a fair price, and with a straight explanation of what was done and why.

We hold the full set of licences and authorisations you'd want from a workshop: ARCtick (automotive refrigerant), AUVIS (blue slip inspections), eSafety (pink slips), and authorised defect-clearance repairer. That means we can handle your servicing, your rego checks, your AC work, and your defect clearance all under the one roof.

If you've had bad experiences with mechanics who charge you for things you didn't need, give you your car back with the same problem still happening, or never call when they say they will — we get it. That's not how we work. We tell you what's wrong, give you a price upfront, call you if anything changes, and hand your keys back when we say we will.

We're proud to be part of the Taree community. Our customers are local families, tradespeople, businesses and farmers — people who've been coming to us for years and send their kids to us when they get their first car. That trust isn't something we take lightly. We do the work properly, and the rest looks after itself.

items.title: Honest Communication
items.desc: We call before we do anything unexpected. You know what's happening to your car at every step.

items.title: Price to match
items.desc: Competitive rates, no hidden charges, and quality work without the mark-ups. If anything changes along the way, you hear from us before the work happens.

items.title: Done Right, On Time
items.desc: Quality work, done properly, ready when we say it'll be ready. That's the standard we hold ourselves to.
